parameters.subject: TORCH ATL Daily Briefing - {{ $json.date }}
parameters.html:
Good Morning, Joi!

{{ $json.date }}

{{ $json.summary.totalBookings }}
Bookings
{{ $json.summary.totalExpectedGuests }}
Expected Guests
{{ $json.summary.pendingGuestLists }}
Pending Guest Lists
{{ $json.summary.facilityReady ? '✓' : '!' }}
Facility Status
{{ $json.alerts.length > 0 ? '

Alerts & Action Items

' : '' }} {{ $json.alerts.map(alert => `
${alert.message}
Action: ${alert.action}
`).join('') }}

Today's Schedule

{{ $json.bookings.length === 0 ? '

No bookings scheduled for today.

' : '' }} {{ $json.bookings.map(booking => `
${booking.startTime} - ${booking.endTime}
${booking.memberName}
Space: ${booking.spaceType} | Event: ${booking.eventType} | Guests: ${booking.expectedGuests} ${booking.guestListSubmitted ? 'Guest List Ready' : 'Guest List Pending'}
${booking.specialRequirements !== 'None' ? `
Special Requirements: ${booking.specialRequirements}
` : ''}
`).join('') }}

Daily Checklist

{{ $json.conciergeChecklist.map(item => `
${item.completed ? '✓' : ''}
${item.task}
`).join('') }}

Open Dashboard

TORCH ATL Operations | Automated Daily Briefing

This email was generated automatically at 8:00 AM

parameters.message: Hi {{ $json.memberName }}! Reminder: Your TORCH session is TODAY at {{ $json.startTime }}. Please submit your guest list ASAP at torchatl.com/guests or reply with names. Thanks!

parameters.text:
=:sunrise: *Daily Operations Briefing*

*{{ $json.date }}*

:calendar: *{{ $json.summary.totalBookings }}* bookings today
:busts_in_silhouette: *{{ $json.summary.totalExpectedGuests }}* expected guests
:clipboard: *{{ $json.summary.pendingGuestLists }}* pending guest lists
:house: Facility: {{ $json.summary.facilityReady ? ':white_check_mark: Ready' : ':warning: Needs attention' }}

{{ $json.alerts.length > 0 ? '*Alerts:*\n' + $json.alerts.map(a => `${a.type === 'critical' ? ':rotating_light:' : a.type === 'warning' ? ':warning:' : ':information_source:'} ${a.message}`).join('\n') : ':white_check_mark: No alerts' }}

<https://torchatl.com/admin/dashboard|Open Dashboard>

nodes.name: Evening 6 PM Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every day at 6 PM for end-of-day summary

parameters.text:
=:moon: *End of Day Summary*

*{{ $json.date }}*

:white_check_mark: *{{ $json.stats.completedBookings }}* sessions completed
:x: *{{ $json.stats.cancelledBookings }}* cancelled
:no_entry: *{{ $json.stats.noShows }}* no-shows
:moneybag: *${{ $json.stats.totalRevenue.toFixed(2) }}* revenue
:clock3: *{{ $json.stats.totalHoursUsed }}* hours used
:busts_in_silhouette: *{{ $json.stats.totalGuests }}* guests served

:calendar: *{{ $json.tomorrowBookings }}* bookings scheduled for tomorrow

Have a great evening! :sparkles:
